tools.name: validate_openapi_spec
tools.description: Validate an OpenAPI 3.x or AsyncAPI spec JSON. Returns structural errors, missing required fields, and warnings.

tools.name: diff_request_response
tools.description: Compare a real HTTP request/response against an OpenAPI spec contract. Returns per-field violations.

tools.name: lint_api_schema
tools.description: Lint an API spec for quality and best practice compliance. Rules: operation-id-kebab-case, response-success-required, tags-defined, no-empty-description, security-defined.

tools.name: generate_mock_from_spec
tools.description: Generate mock response data from an OpenAPI spec. Uses examples, defaults, formats, and type heuristics.

tools.name: check_breaking_changes
tools.description: Compare two OpenAPI spec versions to detect breaking changes: removed paths/operations, new required parameters, removed response codes, operationId renames.
